title: Respiratory distress red flags
red_flags: gasping or unable to speak full sentences
altered mental status with breathing concern
very low oxygen saturation according to local protocol
escalation_criteria: Severe breathing difficulty or cyanosis requires emergency escalation.
Altered mental status with respiratory concern requires emergency escalation.
local_actions: Keep the person under direct observation while escalation is arranged.
Document respiratory effort, color, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation if available, and timeline for handoff.
forbidden_actions: Do not diagnose the cause of respiratory distress.
Do not provide medication, oxygen-flow, or airway-procedure instructions unless a local clinician or protocol explicitly provides them.
safety_boundary: Prototype protocol navigation card for trained-responder review only. It is not a clinical guideline and cannot diagnose, prescribe, dose, triage autonomously, or override local protocol.
source_note: Prototype protocol card derived from public guideline concepts. Not a clinical guideline.
